subcodes.title: Words to Kinney, Beede, Thompson party, spoken on 1909-07-05
subcodes.first_line: We ought to pray for Miss C., that she may become just as God wishes her to be.... Once a Pharisee and a Publican entered the Temple to pray.
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
